# Mutate embedding
    # Mutate merge (create if absent)

    # Read existing flags
    flags: dict[str, str] = {}
    if flags_path.exists():
        for line in flags_path.read_text().splitlines():
            line = line.strip()
            if "=" in line:
                k, v = line.split("=", 1)
                flags[k.strip()] = v.strip()

    if enabled:
        flags[name] = "enabled"
    else:
        flags[name] = "disabled"


    # Write back
    lines = [f"{k}={v}" for k, v in sorted(flags.items())]
    flags_path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n")
